stemHtml: A NOTAM shall be originated and issued concerning which of the following info?

options.a: The occurence or correction of major defects or impediements in the maneuvering area.
options.b: Routine maintenance work on aprons and the taxiways that doesnt affect the safe movement on air.
options.c: The lack of apron marshalling services and road traffic control.
options.d: The unserviceability of location, destination or other instruction signs on the aerodrome movement area.
